views.description: Front view showing the diamond/lens-shaped profile of the part with overall width, inside height, half-height, fillet radii, and 15-degree angled flats at top and bottom.

views.centerline_notes: Horizontal centerline through the holes; two hole centers visible at mid-height of the strip.

features.description: Base extrusion of the lens/diamond-shaped closed profile. Overall width 32.25 in, inside height 14.00 in (7.00 per half), angled flats at 15 deg TYP, extruded to 4.00 in depth. Sheet metal wall 0.060 in (16 GA) suggests thin-walled shell construction.
features.human_note: POSITION ASSUMED for F001: centered on the parent feature because the drawing did not dimension its location — verify placement in SolidWorks.

features.description: .218 DR. THRU holes along a row at 0.50 in from bottom edge on the side face. Spacing and quantity to suit — not specified in drawing.
features.human_note: POSITION ASSUMED for F002: centered on the parent feature because the drawing did not dimension its location — verify placement in SolidWorks.

features.description: 3.00 R. TYP fillet on the corners of the diamond/lens profile sketch. Applied to all sharp corners of the base profile.
features.human_note: POSITION ASSUMED for F003: centered on the parent feature because the drawing did not dimension its location — verify placement in SolidWorks.

symmetry.description: Part is symmetric about the horizontal centerline; top and bottom halves are mirrors (7.00 each side).
Diamond profile appears symmetric about the vertical centerline as well.

equal_spacing.computed_from: Spacing and quantity of holes to suit — not specified in drawing

warnings: Hole quantity and spacing for H001 (.218 DR. THRU) are explicitly left undefined ('SPACING & QUANTITY OF HOLES TO SUIT') — a human must determine these before building.
D005 is an angular dimension (15 deg) but stored under unit 'inch' due to schema constraints — it represents degrees, not inches.
The part appears to be a sheet-metal formed/rolled duct or shroud (16 GA, 0.060 in wall). A shell feature at 0.060 in wall thickness may be needed for accurate thin-walled representation.
D009 (APPX. DEVELOPED LGTH. = 85.68) is a reference/informational note for flat-pattern development, not a controlling dimension.
No title block data (part name, number, revision, material, finish, scale, or tolerance block) is visible in the provided views.
The fillet (F003) is part of the base profile sketch geometry, not a traditional post-extrusion SolidWorks fillet feature.
14.00 is labeled (INSIDE) confirming it is the inner clear dimension. Outer height = 14.00 + 2x0.060 = 14.12 in when modeled as thin shell.
Only two hole centers visible near the right end in the side view; actual hole pattern extent along the 32.25-in length is unspecified.
